creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm going to reject this simply on the grounds that we'd have to use PORTEPOCH because 1.7.0.a is > 1.7.0.

I suggest you change to use the tagged release once an update is available and it is newer than 1.7.0. Sorry, but I hope this makes sense. Your ambition to improve the port is greatly appreciated.
